error.no_auth_token: No auth token available. Please log in.

alert.cache_stale_body: Cached manifest is older than 15 minutes. Cannot proceed offline.
alert.queued_offline_body: Inject order queued. Will sync when connection restores.

login.heading: Sign in
login.subheading: Enter your credentials to access the portal
login.network_error: Network error - is the backend running?

billing_setup.title: Billing Setup
billing_setup.subtitle: Configure how retailers will pay you

error.network: Network error - is the backend running?

bank_details.title: Bank Details
bank_details.description: Enter your bank information for receiving payments from fulfilled orders.

gateway.title: GlobalPaynt Gateway *
gateway.description: Choose how retailers will pay for fulfilled orders. You can change this later in your settings.

cancel_approved.title: Order Cancelled
cancel_approved.body: Your cancellation request for order {order_id} has been approved.

cancel_requested.title: Cancel Request
cancel_requested.body: A retailer has requested cancellation for order {order_id}. Review and approve or deny.

cash_collection_required.title: Cash Collection Required
cash_collection_required.body: Order {order_id} is awaiting cash collection for {amount_minor}.

early_complete_approved.title: Early Completion Approved
early_complete_approved.body: Supplier approved early completion for {remaining_count} remaining orders. Return to your home node.

early_complete_requested.title: Early Route Complete Request
early_complete_requested.body: Driver requested early route completion. Reason: {reason}. {remaining_count} orders remain.

driver.title: Retailer Payment Confirmed
driver.body: Order {order_id} payment is confirmed. Continue route execution.

retailer.title: Payment Completed
retailer.body: Payment for order {order_id} was completed successfully.

retailer.title: Delivery Adjustment Proposed
retailer.body: A quantity change has been proposed for your order {order_id}.

supplier.title: Quantity Negotiation
supplier.body: Driver proposed quantity changes for order {order_id}. Review and approve or reject.

negotiation_resolved.title: Negotiation Resolved
negotiation_resolved.body: Supplier {action} your quantity negotiation for order {order_id}.

offload_confirmed.title: Offload Confirmed
offload_confirmed.body: Offload confirmed for order {order_id}. Payment flow is now active.

supplier.title: Order Cancelled
supplier.body: Order {order_id} was cancelled and removed from active flow.

order_completed.title: Delivery Complete
order_completed.body: Your order {order_id} has been delivered successfully.

retailer.title: Items Out of Stock
retailer.body: Your checkout was blocked because all requested items are out of stock at warehouse {warehouse_id}.

supplier.title: Out of Stock Alert
supplier.body: Retailer checkout was blocked because all requested items are out of stock at warehouse {warehouse_id}.

retailer.title: Payment Completed
retailer.body: Payment for order {order_id} was completed using bypass verification.

supplier.title: Bypass Payment Completed
supplier.body: Order {order_id} was completed with payment bypass confirmation.

payment_bypass_issued.title: Payment Bypass Issued
payment_bypass_issued.body: Supplier issued a payment bypass token for order {order_id}.

payment_failed.title: Payment Failed
payment_failed.body: Payment for order {order_id} via {gateway} failed: {reason}. Please try again.

payment_settled.title: Payment Received
payment_settled.body: Payment of {amount_minor} received for order {order_id} via {gateway}.

driver.title: Payment Received
driver.body: Payment confirmed for your delivery. You may proceed to complete the order.

preorder_auto_accepted.title: Preorder Auto-Accepted
preorder_auto_accepted.body: Your scheduled order {order_id} has been accepted and is now being prepared for delivery on {delivery_date}.

preorder_confirmed.title: Preorder Confirmed
preorder_confirmed.body: You confirmed your scheduled order {order_id}. It will be auto-accepted when the delivery date approaches.

preorder_edited.title: Preorder Updated
preorder_edited.body: Your scheduled order {order_id} has been updated.

retailer_registered.title: Welcome to Pegasus
retailer_registered.body: Account {shop_name} registered. You can now place orders.

driver.title: New Route Assigned
driver.body: Route {route_id} is ready with {stop_count} planned stops.

shop_closed_reported.title: Shop Closed Reported
shop_closed_reported.body: Driver reported shop closed for order {order_id}. Attempt {attempt_id} requires follow-up.

driver.title: Shop-Closed Resolved
driver.body: Shop-closed case for order {order_id} was resolved as {resolution}.

retailer.title: Shop-Closed Resolved
retailer.body: Shop-closed case for order {order_id} was resolved as {resolution}.

retailer.title: Delivery Completed
retailer.body: Order {order_id} was completed via SMS fallback confirmation.

supplier.title: SMS Completion
supplier.body: Driver completed order {order_id} using SMS quick-complete fallback.

supplier.title: Backorder Added
supplier.body: Backorder {backorder_id} was created from shortfall handling.

credit_delivery_marked.title: Credit Delivery
credit_delivery_marked.body: Order {order_id} was delivered on credit and is awaiting supplier review.

driver.title: Credit Delivery Resolved
driver.body: Credit delivery for order {order_id} was {action} by supplier.

retailer.title: Credit Delivery Update
retailer.body: Credit delivery for order {order_id} was {action} by supplier.

dispatch_lock_acquired.title: Dispatch Lock Acquired
dispatch_lock_acquired.body: {lock_type} lock activated by {locked_by}. New orders are queued until the lock is released.

dispatch_lock_released.title: Dispatch Lock Released
dispatch_lock_released.body: {lock_type} lock released by {locked_by}. Queued orders are available for dispatch.

driver_arrived.title: Driver Has Arrived
driver_arrived.body: The driver has arrived for order {order_id}. Please prepare for delivery.

driver_created.title: Driver Registered
driver_created.body: Driver {driver_name} ({phone}) has been added to your fleet.

driver_dispatched.title: New Dispatch Assignment
driver_dispatched.body: You have been assigned route {route_id} with {order_count} orders. Check your route for details.

driver_online.title: Driver Back Online
driver_online.body: Driver {driver_name} is back online and available for dispatch.

factory_created.title: Factory Created
factory_created.body: Factory {factory_name} is now active ({warehouses_linked} warehouses linked).

factory_manifest_created.title: Factory Manifest Created
factory_manifest_created.body: Factory manifest {route_id} created with {stop_count} convoy stops.

force_seal_alert.title: FORCE-SEAL Threshold
force_seal_alert.body: Override quota is at {count_24h} of {quota} in 24 hours on manifest {manifest_id}. Investigate the loading bay.

freeze_lock_acquired.title: AI Freeze Lock Engaged
freeze_lock_acquired.body: AI worker paused for scope {scope} during manual dispatch.

freeze_lock_released.title: AI Freeze Lock Released
freeze_lock_released.body: AI worker resumed for scope {scope}. Dispatch automation is back online.

manifest_cancelled.title: Manifest Cancelled
manifest_cancelled.body: Manifest {manifest_id} was cancelled ({reason}). {released_count} orders were released.

manifest_completed.title: Manifest Completed
manifest_completed.body: Manifest {manifest_id} closed: all {stop_count} stops were delivered.

manifest_dispatched.title: Manifest Dispatched
manifest_dispatched.body: Manifest {manifest_id} departed the gate with {stop_count} stops.

manifest_dlq_escalation.title: Manifest DLQ Escalation
manifest_dlq_escalation.body: Order {order_id} on manifest {manifest_id} exceeded the retry threshold and requires intervention.

manifest_draft_created.title: Manifest Draft Created
manifest_draft_created.body: Manifest {manifest_id} draft created with {stop_count} planned stops.

manifest_order_exception.title: Manifest Exception
manifest_order_exception.body: Exception {reason} occurred on order {order_id} in manifest {manifest_id}.

missing_items_report.title: Missing Items Report
missing_items_report.body: Driver reported {item_count} missing items from order {order_id} after sealing.

payload_ready_to_seal.title: Orders Ready to Seal
payload_ready_to_seal.body: Route {route_id} has {order_count} orders ready for payload sealing. Proceed to the loading dock.

payload_sealed.title: Payload Sealed
payload_sealed.body: Order {order_id} was sealed by terminal {terminal_id} and is ready for dispatch.

warehouse_created.title: Warehouse Created
warehouse_created.body: Warehouse {warehouse_name} is now active for supplier operations.

disabled.title: Warehouse Disabled
disabled.body: Warehouse {warehouse_id} has been disabled. Orders may be rerouted.

manifest_order_reassigned.title: Order Reassigned
manifest_order_reassigned.body: Order {order_id} has been moved to a new manifest. ETA may shift.

order_amended.title: Order Amended
order_amended.refund_body: Order {order_id} has been amended. Refund of {refunded_minor} applied for returned items.
order_amended.no_refund_body: Order {order_id} has been amended. No refund required.

order_cancelled_by_origin.title: Order Cancelled
order_cancelled_by_origin.body: Order {order_id} was cancelled by origin: {reason}. Pending payment was voided.

order_dispatched.title: Order Dispatched
order_dispatched.body: Your order has been dispatched on route {route_id}. {order_count} orders are on the way.

order_reassigned_added.title: New Order Added to Route
order_reassigned_added.body: Order {order_id} has been reassigned to your route. Check route updates.

order_reassigned_removed.title: Order Removed from Route
order_reassigned_removed.body: Order {order_id} has been reassigned to another driver and removed from your route.

payload_overflow.title: Payload Overflow
payload_overflow.body: Order {order_id} was removed from manifest {manifest_id} because of payload overflow and queued for redispatch.

power_outage_reported.title: Power Outage Reported
power_outage_reported.body: Driver reported a probable power outage at retailer for order {order_id}.

created.title: Custom Pricing Applied
created.body: A custom price has been set for you on product {sku_id}.

removed.title: Custom Pricing Removed
removed.body: Custom pricing for product {sku_id} has been removed. Standard pricing applies.

shop_closed.title: Driver Waiting - Shop Appears Closed
shop_closed.body: Driver reported shop closed for order {order_id}. Attempt {attempt_id} requires follow-up.

shop_closed_escalated.title: Shop Closed Escalation
shop_closed_escalated.body: Order {order_id} was escalated for immediate supplier action.

shop_closed_escalation.title: Shop Closed Escalation
shop_closed_escalation.body: Order {order_id} was escalated for immediate supplier action.

shop_closed_resolved.title: Shop-Closed Resolved
shop_closed_resolved.body: Order {order_id} shop-closed case was resolved by Admin: {action}.

driver.title: Shop-Closed Resolved
driver.body: Shop-closed case for order {order_id} was resolved as {resolution}.

retailer.title: Shop-Closed Resolved
retailer.body: Shop-closed case for order {order_id} was resolved as {resolution}.

retailer.title: Split Payment Created
retailer.body: Split payment created for order {order_id}: first {first_amount_minor}, second {second_amount_minor}.

supplier.title: Split Payment Created
supplier.body: Split payment created for order {order_id}: first {first_amount_minor}, second {second_amount_minor}.

supply_lane_updated.title: Supply Lane Updated
supply_lane_updated.body: Transit estimate updated for lane {lane_id} to {new_dampened_hours}h.

vehicle_created.title: Vehicle Registered
vehicle_created.body: Vehicle {vehicle_label} ({license_plate}) has been added to your fleet.
